title: Bootstrap local corpus
description: No local corpus directory found. Create `data/corpus/` and populate it with plain-text or JSON documents (books, papers, code, etc.) to enable knowledge-based improvements. All data stays local – no external services required.

title: Bootstrap art dataset
description: No art dataset exists yet. Collect at least 1 000 diverse, high-quality images to enable future fine-tuning.

title: Generate 5,000 synthetic training samples from local corpus
description: Only 0 synthetic samples exist (target: 5 000). Use the DarwinLM (running locally) to generate question→answer pairs from corpus documents. No external API needed.

title: Add 10 missing topic area(s) to corpus
description: The following broad topics are absent from the corpus: biology, chemistry, computer_science, economics, history, linguistics, literature, mathematics, philosophy, physics. Source free materials (e.g. Wikipedia dumps, Project Gutenberg, ArXiv preprints) and ingest them locally.

title: Add test coverage for darwin\cli.py
description: No coverage data found for `darwin\cli.py`. Create a corresponding test module to ensure correctness.

title: Expand negative prompt to reduce artefacts
description: The current negative prompt is missing: blurry, low quality, artefacts, distorted, overexposed. Adding these terms reduces common generation artefacts.
diff: negative_prompt += ', blurry, low quality, artefacts, distorted, overexposed, underexposed, pixelated, noisy, jpeg artefacts'
